enrichCN: 电影质感胶片摄影，光影美学，柔和侧逆光，复古暖调光影，明暗层次丰富。
梦幻柔焦氛围，轻盈通透的空气感，晨雾般的光线弥漫。
宏伟壮丽的自然风光，广阔景深，气势磅礴的构图。
enrichEN: cinematic film photography, light and shadow aesthetics, soft rim lighting, retro warm tones, rich chiaroscuro.
dreamy soft focus atmosphere, ethereal and translucent airy feel, misty diffused light.
majestic natural landscape, expansive depth of field, grand and powerful composition.
skinCN: 皮肤细腻真实，自然光泽，细节丰富。
肤若凝脂，瓷白透亮，柔滑细腻。
健康小麦色肌肤，阳光活力，纹理自然。
skinEN: realistic skin texture, natural glow, rich in detail.
porcelain skin, luminous and translucent, smooth and delicate.
healthy tan skin, sun-kissed and vibrant, natural texture.
qualityCN: 8K 超高清写实摄影，电影胶片级画质，极致的真实感表现，细节丰富。
4K 画质，精确光影追踪，物理级材质渲染，极致清晰。
大师级摄影作品，完美曝光，构图精妙，色彩科学。
qualityEN: 8K ultra-high-definition realistic photography, cinematic film-grade quality, extremely realistic texture, rich in detail.
4K quality, accurate ray-traced lighting, physically-based material rendering, pin-sharp clarity.
masterpiece photography, perfect exposure, exquisite composition, color-graded to perfection.
